category_sources: Official timelimit page describes executing a command and terminating it after configured warning/kill timeouts.
source_facts.description says it limits a process's absolute execution time.
display_name_sources: Official project page heading is timelimit.
docs_sources: Official timelimit page is the best documentation surface found and includes description plus release/download information.
repo_sources: Official timelimit page states it is developed in a GitLab Git repository and links to gitlab.com/timelimit/timelimit.
tags_sources: Official page describes process timeout behavior with warning and kill signals.
source_facts.executables lists timelimit as a CLI executable.
